jd_analysis_result.summary: The Assistant in Nursing (AIN) role involves providing basic nursing care under the supervision of a Registered Nurse within a team setting at The Children's Hospital at Westmead. The position focuses on delivering quality individualized care to children and young people living with cancer, while adhering to health guidelines and maintaining patient confidentiality.

credential: certificate iii in health services assistance

skill_evidence.teamwork: Demonstrated ability to be an effective team member
skill_evidence.verbal communication: Demonstrated excellent written and verbal communication skills
skill_evidence.written communication: Demonstrated excellent written and verbal communication skills
skill_evidence.certificate iii in health services assis: Completion of HLT33115 Certificate III in Health Services Assistance (Descriptor Assisting in Nursing Work in Acute Care)

responsibilities: Assist in the provision of basic nursing care under the direct supervision of a Registered Nurse.
Maintain patient confidentiality at all times.
Demonstrate ethical behaviour in their performance.
Provide evidence of completion of annual mandatory training.
Practice within the NSW Health guidelines and adhere to Policies and Procedures.
